source_scope: redacted point-in-time excerpts from local Zsilip runtime proof files

removed_or_masked: private paths where not needed for interpretation

claims_supported.claim: Zsilip is a multi-service local edge system, not a static mockup.
Uplink selection is based on observable route and score signals.
Campaign execution is gated by temporal state and external HTTP policy.
The project already has a proof-first and handoff-oriented audit layer.

claims_not_made: This is not a security audit report.
This is not a production SLA or reliability guarantee.
This does not expose live administrative access.
This does not prove legal or regulatory readiness.
This does not publish raw private network data.
recommended_next_public_evidence: redacted failover test timeline with packet-loss chart
service and port inventory with privilege boundaries
expert review checklist with open findings
